Figure 1: Illustration for a route with 4 customers and C = 10. We show two recourse actions for a given scenario ξ ∈ [N ] and a directed route R⃗ = (v1, v2, v3, v4). The black numbers refer to the demands in scenario ξ, the blue numbers (solid arcs) indicate the values of fξ and the red numbers (dashed arcs) indicate the values of gξ.
